title: bitwarden accesses undocumented internal SDK field
description: secretx-bitwarden calls client.internal.get_access_token_organization() — the 'internal' field is not part of the public Bitwarden SDK API. Any bitwarden-sdk minor bump that renames or removes this field will cause a compile error with no warning. Risk: silent breakage on 'cargo update'. Must be replaced with a public API call or explicitly pinned with a comment explaining why and what to watch for.
